extortion.description: [AI generated] Escada.com is the online platform for ESCADA, a luxury women's fashion brand which is based in Germany. Established in 1978, ESCADA is known for its modern, glamorous designs, offering a unique blend of elegance, vibrancy and stand-out style. Their product line includes ready-to-wear items, accessories, footwear, fragrances, and eyewear. The brand seeks to empower women through its high-quality and fashion-forward designs.
